summary: App Router is the default in Next.js 13+; in Next 16 the Pages Router has been removed. Server Components run by default; client components opt in with 'use client'.
bestPractices: Default `async function Page` to a Server Component; opt in to client only when needed.
Co-locate route handlers in `route.ts` files within app/ segments.
Use `loading.tsx` and `error.tsx` segment files for streaming UI and error boundaries.
Prefer Server Actions for mutations over standalone `app/api/*` routes when the action is co-located with the consumer UI.
Use `'use cache'` (Next 16+) to opt segments or functions into the new caching primitive.
antiPatterns: Importing `next/router` from anywhere under `app/` — use `next/navigation` instead.
Mixing `pages/` and `app/` directories in projects targeting Next 16 (Pages Router removed).
Reading process.env or filesystem APIs from a `'use client'` module.
